INTEGER.description: Signed whole number type, typical storage of 4 bytes with platform-dependent range

BIGINT.description: 8-byte signed integer for very large whole numbers

DECIMAL.description: Exact numeric type with fixed precision and scale, ideal for financial data

FLOAT.description: Approximate floating-point numeric type with implementation-dependent precision

VARCHAR.description: Variable-length character string with maximum length n

CHAR.description: Fixed-length character string padded with spaces to length n

TEXT.description: Variable-length character string with no specified maximum, for large text data

BOOLEAN.description: Logical value type with TRUE, FALSE, and UNKNOWN states

DATE.description: Calendar date value with year, month, and day components

TIMESTAMP.description: Date and time value with optional time zone awareness

BLOB.description: Binary large object for storing images, files, and arbitrary binary data

JSON.description: Stores JSON data as text or binary format with query support

UUID.description: Universally unique identifier, 128-bit value typically displayed as hex with dashes

ARRAY.description: One-dimensional or multi-dimensional array of a base data type

NULL.description: Special marker indicating the absence of a value, not equal to anything including itself
